name: DPDP - Report Ready Email

parameters.subject: Your DPDP Compliance Report is ready 📋
parameters.html:
Hi {{ $json.business_name }},

Your full DPDP Compliance Report is ready! Here's what's included:

  • Compliance Risk Score (0–100)
  • All compliance gaps with severity levels
  • Prioritised action plan
  • Template legal notices
  • PDF download

View Your Full Report →

This link is permanent — bookmark it for future reference.

— DPDP Checker Team

notes: Triggered when Claude finishes generating full report. Payload: {email, business_name, report_url, risk_score, risk_level}
